title: [Bug]: The ZEROFILL attribute affects the results of queries.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, c2 DATE DEFAULT NULL);
SELECT c0, c1, STR_TO_HEX(CONCAT(c0, '')) FROM t2 WHERE c0 IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE t3 (c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE);
key_bug_features: ZEROFILL attribute alters query result consistency
